Klasse EasyDifficulty

java.lang.Object
difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
difficulties.EasyDifficulty
public class EasyDifficulty extends DifficultyStrategy
Represents a strategy for the easy difficulty in the game. This class extends the DifficultyStrategy to implement complex move calculations and removal strategies for players.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Node[]
    calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer player, ImaginativePlayer opponent)
    Calculates the optimal move for a player based on a specific difficulty strategy.
    Node
    calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer player, ImaginativePlayer opponent)
    Determines the node from which a stone should be removed as part of the strategy.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden difficulties.DifficultyStrategy

    blockBeginnerTrap, blockMill, blockZwickmill, clusterMove, entry, findMill, findZwickMill, openMill, randomMove, randomRemoval, removeMillThreat, tryMoves, useFiggerMill

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • EasyDifficulty

      public EasyDifficulty()

  • Methodendetails

    • calculateMove

      public Node[] calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer player, ImaginativePlayer opponent)
      Beschreibung aus Klasse kopiert: DifficultyStrategy
      Calculates the optimal move for a player based on a specific difficulty strategy. This method generates a set of possible moves
      Angegeben von:
      calculateMove in Klasse DifficultyStrategy
      Siehe auch:
      • EasyDifficulty
      • MediumDifficulty
      • HardDifficulty

    • calculateRemoval

      public Node calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer player, ImaginativePlayer opponent)
      Beschreibung aus Klasse kopiert: DifficultyStrategy
      Determines the node from which a stone should be removed as part of the strategy. This method is intended to analyze the game state and decide on the optimal removal of an opponent's stone, adhering to the rules and the strategy being implemented.
      Angegeben von:
      calculateRemoval in Klasse DifficultyStrategy
      Parameter:
      player - The player executing the removal.
      opponent - The opponent whose stone might be removed.
      Gibt zurück:
      The node representing the stone to be removed, or null if no valid removal is found.
      Siehe auch:
      • EasyDifficulty
      • MediumDifficulty
      • HardDifficulty
